title: Australian Sausage Hash
description: A hearty breakfast dish from Down Under, featuring sausages and crispy hash.

ingredients.name: Australian Sausages
ingredients.notes: Cooked to an internal temperature of 160°F (71°C)

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the hash browns and cook until crispy and golden brown, stirring occasionally.
Push the hash browns to one side of the pan.
Add the Australian sausages to the other side of the pan and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Flip the sausages and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Return the hash browns to the pan and stir to combine with the sausages.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
